title: crotalaria keniensis
intro: Crotalaria keniensis, a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae, is native to East Africa. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities, which can help protect against infections and oxidative stress. The health benefits of Crotalaria keniensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anticancer properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Crotalaria keniensis is prepared by making teas or infusions from the leaves and flowers, or by using the roots to create a decoction for medicinal purposes.
